name: Chocolate Pecan Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in the vanilla.
3. Add the flour and mix only until blended; the dough will be stiff.
4. Stir in the pecans and 1 cup of semi-sweet chocolate chip pieces.
5. Press the dough into a 13 x 9-inch pan.
6. Sprinkle the top with 1/3 cup baking bits and press lightly into the dough.
7. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes or until light golden brown.
8. Cool completely.
9. Drizzle with Chocolate Glaze.
10. Cut into bars.
11. Store in a tightly covered container.
Chocolate Glaze:
1. Place the remaining semi-sweet chocolate chips in a microwave-safe container.
2. Add 1/2 cup milk.
3. Heat for 30 seconds on HIGH; stir until the chocolate is completely melted and the mixture is smooth.
4. Blend in additional milk, 1 teaspoon at a time, to reach the desired consistency.
5. Pour the mixture into a zipper-type plastic sandwich bag.
6. Close the bag tightly, removing all air.
7. Snip a tiny piece off one corner of the bag (no more than 1/8 inch).
8. Hold the top of the bag tightly and drizzle the glaze in the desired pattern.
